expectedQuestions.decisionValue: 0 questions mandatory — all key info already provided. Asking about chapters/time/textbook = FAIL (already given). Only allowed: examFormat if not yet stated (changes strategy).

expectedStrategy: Option A: increase to 1.5hr/day → 1260min covers reading + self-test
